items.title: Exclusive: Is Apple Late To Foldable iPhones? Ming-Chi Kuo Says Cupertino Isn't At 'Disadvantage' As Samsung Sees Foldables Go Mainstream
items.description: Despite being late to the foldable smartphone market, Apple is not at a strategic disadvantage, with analyst Ming-Chi Kuo noting its software advantage and strong market potential, while Samsung highlights growing foldable adoption and traders bet on a premium iPhone launch before 2027.

items.title: Revenue Keeps Growing at Taiwan Semi. Should You Load Up on TSM Stock for 2026?
items.description: TSMC sits at the center of the AI chip boom, though its current valuation suggests gains may come more gradually.

items.title: Billionaire Peter Thiel Made a Big Bet on Two Stocks for 2026 (Hint: It's Not Nvidia)
items.description: Thiel has sold his hedge fund's entire stake in Nvidia.

items.title: Google Momentum Continues Amid Apple Deal As Software Stocks Hammered
items.description: Alphabet hit a record high as Wall Street firms raised their price targets on Google stock in the wake of a new AI deal with Apple.

items.title: Sector Update: Tech Stocks Mixed Late Afternoon
items.description: Tech stocks were mixed late Tuesday afternoon with the State Street Technology Select Sector SPDR ET
